_publications._publicationTitle: Co-targeting the MAPK and PI3K/AKT/mTOR pathways in two genetically engineered mouse models of schwann cell tumors reduces tumor grade and multiplicity.

_contextSnippet: While many targeted therapies, including these, have been shown to act cytostatically, it is of clinical importance that, in combination, these inhibitors act cytotoxically
details: Combination therapy acts cytotoxically rather than cytostatically
